sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41147" key="e)pisu/nqetos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισύν-θετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n41147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compound</tr_>: hence <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-σύνθετον</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metre composed of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῶλα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of different</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γένη,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
